final:
module top_module(input [31:0] zero_in,
              one_in,
              two_in,
              three_in,
              input [1:0] signal,
              output reg [31:0] obf_mux_out);always @(signal or zero_in or one_in or two_in or three_in) begin
    case (signal)
    2'b00: obf_mux_out = zero_in;
    2'b01: obf_mux_out = one_in;
    2'b10: obf_mux_out = two_in;
    2'b11: obf_mux_out = three_in;
    endcase
end
  
endmodule
